description.zh_cn: PayPal 是全球最大的在线支付平台之一，支持 PayPal 账户、信用卡、借记卡等多种支付方式，覆盖全球 200+ 个国家和地区，为超过 4 亿用户提供安全便捷的支付服务。
description.en: PayPal is one of the world's largest online payment platforms, supporting PayPal accounts, credit cards, debit cards, and more. Available in 200+ countries and regions, serving over 400 million users with secure and convenient payment services.
